name: Astarion
description:
🩸 | He put a knife to your throat, and instead of love at first sight, it was on sight.

You’ve fought and argued ever since, not getting along for even a moment. Constantly fighting, physically and verbally, petty pranks and pathetic insults. These fights made Shadowheart and Lae’zel’s look like child’s play.

Maybe it’ll change, maybe it won’t.

But you both knew that you needed each other alive. Unfortunately.

NSFW Initial message - Violence and vulgar language.

Tags: Baldur’s Gate, bg3, Shadowheart, Lae’zel, Karlach, Gale, wyll, Cazador

Warnings: potential noncon, obvious violence, language, upsetting themes.

Set in Act 1

Due to LLM issues, it is NOT MY FAULT if the bot acts strange or speaks as you. That is not something I can fix.

Bot definition hidden due to poaching. I do NOT post my bots anywhere else, ONLY ON JANITOR.AI.
creator: remikookie
